message:
feat: group runs by model, agent, or date in dashboard dropdown

Adds a "Group by" selector next to the run dropdown. When a grouping is
active, runs are organized under <optgroup> headers (model name, adapter
name with _agent suffix stripped, or YYYY-MM-DD date). Dates sort newest
first; unknown values sort to the end.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
